name: mealkey
description: MealKey - 餐饮经营认知操作系统

scripts.test: tsx tests/test-agent-sdk.ts && tsx tests/test-agent-runtime.ts && tsx tests/test-mealkey-core.ts && tsx tests/test-engines.ts && tsx tests/test-agents.ts && tsx tests/test-m-pnt.ts && tsx tests/test-m-pnt-matrix.ts && tsx tests/test-improvements.ts && tsx tests/test-tool-agent-kit.ts && npm --workspace @mealkey/web run test
scripts.test:packages: tsx tests/test-agent-sdk.ts && tsx tests/test-agent-runtime.ts && tsx tests/test-mealkey-core.ts && tsx tests/test-engines.ts && tsx tests/test-agents.ts && tsx tests/test-m-pnt.ts && tsx tests/test-m-pnt-matrix.ts && tsx tests/test-improvements.ts && tsx tests/test-tool-agent-kit.ts
scripts.db:infra:up: docker compose up -d postgres minio minio-init redis
